title: Kidambi Srikanth Reaches US Open Final, Finishes Runner-Up
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth's journey to the US Open final is a significant achievement for Indian badminton.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth battled his way to the US Open final but ultimately fell short, finishing as the runner-up.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No 6 Chou Tien Chen at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian talent Rounak Chouhan secured a major upset victory over a top-ranked player at an international event.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, caused a stir at the US Open by defeating World No 6 Chou Tien Chen.

title: Indian Asian Games Badminton Squad Announced, Treesa-Gayatri Return
indian_angle: This report details the composition of India's national badminton squad for the upcoming prestigious Asian Games.
summary: The Indian badminton squad for the Asian Games has been announced, featuring the return of the women's doubles pair Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand.

title: Satwik-Chirag Crowned Singapore Open Champions After Dominant Display
indian_angle: India's premier men's doubles pair secured a significant Super 750 title, showcasing their world-class form.
summary: Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty delivered a spectacular performance to win the Singapore Open, delighting fans with their aggressive play and celebrations.

title: Tanisha-Dhruv Secure Impressive Win Over Watanabe-Taguchi at Singapore Open
indian_angle: The Indian mixed doubles pair achieved a notable upset against a strong Japanese duo at a major tournament.
summary: Indian mixed doubles pair Tanisha Crasto and Dhruv Kapila pulled off an impressive victory against the formidable Japanese duo of Yuta Watanabe and Maya Taguchi at the Singapore Open.
